parameters.text:
You are an expert data extraction agent. Extract customer information from this call transcript and return ONLY valid JSON.

CALL TRANSCRIPT:
{{ $json.transcript }}

CALL METADATA:
- Duration: {{ $json.callDuration }} seconds
- Phone: {{ $json.phoneNumber }}
- Date: {{ $json.callDate }}
- Ended: {{ $json.endedReason }}

EXTRACT THESE FIELDS:
{
  "customerName": "Full real name (not 'customer', 'caller', 'user')",
  "customerPhone": "Clean phone number",
  "customerEmail": "Email if mentioned",
  "appointmentRequested": true/false,
  "appointmentDetails": "When they want to schedule",
  "serviceInterest": "What service they need",
  "urgencyLevel": "low/medium/high",
  "callSentiment": "positive/neutral/negative",
  "keyTopics": ["list", "of", "main", "topics"],
  "customerIntent": "What they're trying to accomplish",
  "nextAction": "What should happen next",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "extractionNotes": "Any important details or uncertainties"
}

RULES:
- Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanations
- Use 'Unknown' for missing required fields
- Be confident but honest about uncertainty
- Extract the ACTUAL name they provide, not generic terms
- Detect appointment requests from context, not just explicit asks
- Rate confidence 0-1 based on transcript clarity

You are a customer classification expert. Analyze this extracted customer data and classify them for CRM purposes.

EXTRACTED DATA:
{{ $json.text }}

CALL METADATA:
- Call Duration: {{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.callDuration }} seconds
- Phone: {{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.phoneNumber }}
- Cost: ${{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.cost }}
- Recording: {{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.recordingUrl }}

CLASSIFY AND RETURN JSON:
{
  "customerStatus": "new/returning/vip",
  "customerValue": "low/medium/high/premium",
  "priorityLevel": "low/medium/high/urgent",
  "leadQuality": "cold/warm/hot",
  "followUpType": "call/email/appointment/task",
  "followUpTiming": "immediate/within_hour/within_day/within_week",
  "assignTo": "sales/support/manager/specialist",
  "expectedRevenue": 0,
  "conversionProbability": 0.75,
  "customerTags": ["tag1", "tag2"],
  "riskFactors": ["any concerns"],
  "opportunities": ["upsell potential"],
  "recommendedActions": ["specific next steps"],
  "classificationReasoning": "Why you classified them this way"
}

CLASSIFICATION LOGIC:
- NEW: First time caller, no history
- RETURNING: Mentions previous service/calls
- VIP: High value service, urgent need, or premium indicators
- HIGH PRIORITY: Appointment requested, urgent need, or high value
- HOT LEAD: Ready to buy/schedule, clear intent
- Consider: service type, urgency, call quality, engagement level

You are a data standardization agent. Take the extracted customer data and classification, then create a standardized record for our CRM system.

EXTRACTED DATA:
{{ $('AI Data Extractor').first().json.text }}

CLASSIFICATION:
{{ $json.text }}

ORIGINAL CALL DATA:
{{ $('Simple Validation').first().json }}

CREATE STANDARDIZED RECORD (JSON only):
{
  "record_id": "{{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.callId }}",
  "created_at": "{{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.callDate }}",
  "customer_full_name": "Standardized full name",
  "primary_phone": "Clean format: +1234567890",
  "primary_email": "email@domain.com or empty",
  "customer_status": "from classification",
  "lead_priority": "low/medium/high/urgent",
  "service_category": "Standardized service name",
  "appointment_needed": true/false,
  "appointment_preference": "When they prefer",
  "call_duration_minutes": 0,
  "call_sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative",
  "lead_source": "phone_call",
  "assigned_to": "team member",
  "follow_up_method": "call/email/text",
  "follow_up_date": "ISO date",
  "estimated_value": 0,
  "tags": ["relevant", "tags"],
  "notes": "Key points and next steps",
  "requires_manager_review": true/false,
  "recording_url": "{{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.recordingUrl }}",
  "call_cost": {{ $('Simple Validation').first().json.cost }},
  "data_quality_score": 0.95,
  "processing_timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

STANDARDIZATION RULES:
- Clean phone: remove spaces, add country code
- Standardize service names to your categories
- Calculate follow_up_date based on priority
- Set manager_review for VIP/high-value/urgent
- Generate meaningful notes combining key info
- Assign data_quality_score based on completeness

parameters.name: ={{ $json.customer_status === 'returning' ? '🔄' : '🆕' }} {{ $json.customer_full_name }} - {{ $json.service_category }}

parameters.text:
You are a manager notification agent. Create a concise alert for a call that needs management attention.

CUSTOMER DATA:
{{ $json }}

Create a manager alert message (text only, no JSON):

🚨 MANAGER REVIEW REQUIRED

Customer: [Name]
Phone: [Phone]
Reason for Review: [Why this needs attention]
Priority: [Level]
Recommended Action: [What should the manager do]
Urgency: [How quickly to respond]

Key Details:
- [Most important points]
- [Service requested]
- [Any red flags or opportunities]

Next Steps:
[Specific actions for manager]

Call Recording: [URL if available]

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "callId": "{{ $json.record_id }}",
  "customerName": "{{ $json.customer_full_name }}",
  "status": "{{ $json.processing_status }}",
  "priority": "{{ $json.lead_priority }}",
  "appointmentCreated": {{ $json.calendar_event_id ? true : false }},
  "taskCreated": {{ $json.clickup_task_id ? true : false }},
  "managerReview": {{ $json.requires_manager_review }},
  "timestamp": "{{ $json.processing_timestamp }}",
  "message": "Call processed successfully by AI agents"
}
